creator: coryking@mozimedia.com
text:
Doh!  There looked to be fixes for some MP2 issues (particularly the cleanup
handler patch) I was running into on my production servers.
 
Didn't realize you were both the author and the port maintainer!  I guess
that means I don't have to watch this port for upgrades and if you have
something on CPAN and it isn't on the ports tree, there is a good reason :-)

... I'll roll back the changes to my local tinderbox portstree.  Is there
anything quickish I might be able to help you with?

--
Cory R. King
Mozi Media Group, LLC.
http://www.mozimedia.com
